steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The table gives $(x, f(x))$ pairs where $x$ is roof area in square feet and $f(x)$ is gallons drained. The question asks which linear equation matches all rows. The constant of proportionality $k$ in $f(x) = kx$ equals $f(x)/x$ for any row.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — $f(x)=0.6x$: ratio $= 0.6$. The table gives a ratio of $1.8$ for every row. ✗
  • Choice B — $f(x)=1.8x$: ratio $= 1.8$. Matches every row in the table. ✓
  • Choice C — $f(x)=2{,}268.0x$: ratio is far too large — this would give thousands of gallons per square foot. ✗
  • Choice D — $f(x)=0.56x$: ratio $= 0.56$. Does not match the table. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
